title: Harvest Moon
why_this_song: Harvest Moon by Neil Young (1992) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Because I'm still in love with you
I wanna see you dance again
Because I'm still in love with you
Hear what I have to say
We could dream this night away

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "because" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "because" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "moon" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "moon" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I wanna see you dance again

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Neil Young one question about "Harvest Moon", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Neil Young sobre "Harvest Moon", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Harvest Moon" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Harvest Moon" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Harvest Moon" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Harvest Moon" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Harvest Moon" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Harvest Moon" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Harvest Moon" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Harvest Moon" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
